response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio consists entirely of spoken dialogue, matching the description in Scene 1 of the Reference JSON (intro talk and merchandise promotion). 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON lyrics were for a song that does not appear in this specific video segment; therefore, 100% manual transcription and translation were performed for the spoken vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the vocal bursts. Aggressive truncation was applied to maintain semantic flow during rapid speech, particularly during the merchandise explanation and the playful banter regarding the QR code.

subtitles.original: いーよぉーっし！
subtitles.english: Alright!

subtitles.original: グッズ紹介！
subtitles.english: Goods introduction!

subtitles.original: お前らへの感謝とこれからの意気込みをありのまま伝えるフリートークボイスになっています。
subtitles.english: It's a free talk voice recording where I share my gratitude and future enthusiasm.

subtitles.original: ボイスはフルセットを購入したら必ず付いてくるから安心してね。
subtitles.english: The voice recording is included with the full set, so don't worry.

subtitles.original: 以上、グッズ紹介でした！
subtitles.english: That's all for the goods introduction!

subtitles.original: みんな、今日は... 月曜日だね。
subtitles.english: Everyone, today is... Monday.

subtitles.original: そんな月曜日のお前らには... じゃーん！
subtitles.english: For all of you on such a Monday... ta-dah!

subtitles.original: 今日は月曜日！犬！今回は犬です。
subtitles.english: Today is Monday! Dog! It's a dog this time.

subtitles.original: 今日は月曜日ということで、犬のフリップ。
subtitles.english: Since today is Monday, here's a dog flip-board.

subtitles.original: 今年ね、エイプリルフールネタを擦っていきますよ。ワン！
subtitles.english: I'm going to keep using this year's April Fools' joke. Woof!

subtitles.original: えっと、このあとメン限にてアンコールライブもやっちゃうよー！
subtitles.english: Um, I'll be doing an encore live for members after this!

subtitles.original: このQRコードは何なんだ？
subtitles.english: What is this QR code?

subtitles.original: アンコールではちょっとお前らのリクエストに答えたりするかも。うん、このQRあーあ...
subtitles.english: I might take some requests during the encore. Yeah, this QR code, ah...

subtitles.original: いけないいけない、お前ら読み込んでしまう。
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, you guys will scan it.

subtitles.original: このQRを読み込んだら、えっと、メンバーシップに入れるみたいです。
subtitles.english: If you scan this QR, apparently you can join the membership.

subtitles.original: うん、じゃあ見せないんでおっく、うぇーい、見せないんでおっく。
subtitles.english: So I'll put it away, ueei, I won't show it.

subtitles.original: え、見せちゃおうかな？どうしようかな？
subtitles.english: Eh, should I show it? What should I do?

subtitles.original: はい！えっと、それじゃあ...
subtitles.english: Okay! Well then...

subtitles.original: 今日は本当に、あの、奏のライブに見に来てくれてありがとうございました。
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for coming to see Kanade's live performance today.

subtitles.original: 全編生ライブというすごい奏においても挑戦的なライブでして...
subtitles.english: It was an entirely live performance, which was very challenging even for Kanade...

subtitles.original: 本当はめちゃくちゃ怖かったんですけど...
subtitles.english: To be honest, I was really, really scared...

subtitles.original: あの、なんとかなんとか、すごいポストXだったり、お前らがこう...
subtitles.english: But somehow, thanks to all the posts on X and you guys...

subtitles.original: 応援のメッセージを送ってくれたおかげですごいな... もう緊張もそんなにせず終えられたかなと思います。
subtitles.english: ...sending me messages of support, I think I was able to finish without being that nervous.

subtitles.original: 本当に見に来てくれてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to see me!

subtitles.original: それではメン限アンコールライブでまた会おうね！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's meet again at the membership encore live!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！またね！
subtitles.english: Thank you! See you later!

subtitles.original: チャンネル登録してね！
subtitles.english: Please subscribe to the channel!
